name: XAI Octagon Floating Rate & Alternative Income Term Trust 6.50% Series 2026 Term Preferred Shares (Liquidation Preference $25.00)
summary: XAI Octagon Floating Rate & Alternative Income Term Trust 6.50% Series 2026 Term Preferred Shares (Liquidation Preference $25.00) is a preferred equity investment. It pays a fixed dividend and has a liquidation preference. The company is managed by XAI Asset Management, LLC and is based in Chicago, Illinois.
